channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government Imposes Austerity Steps to Counter Fuel Crisis from Middle East Conflict

item.title: IT Company Confirms Compliance with LTO Concession Amid Graft Allegations

item.title: Controversial haunted house cold open from The Office's 'Koi Pond' episode removed after initial broadcast due to suicide depiction
item.description: A deleted cold open from the season 6 episode 'Koi Pond' of the US version of The Office, which first aired on 29 October 2009, has resurfaced in discussions after being shared online. The scene depic...

item.title: Alex Eala Honors Her Mother on International Women's Day
item.description: Filipino tennis sensation Alex Eala took a moment on International Women's Day to honor her mother, expressing gratitude for her constant support throughout her career. Known for her accomplishments o...

item.title: Cadillac's Formula One debut in Australia deemed a success by team CEO despite challenges

item.title: New York Jets Trade for Minkah Fitzpatrick from Miami Dolphins
item.description: The New York Jets are set to acquire Miami Dolphins All-Pro defensive back Minkah Fitzpatrick in a trade, marking a significant move as NFL free agency begins. According to ESPN, the Dolphins will sen...

item.title: Guide to Designing a Timeless Backyard Pool
item.description: Creating a timeless backyard pool involves more than just choosing a shape or color. A truly enduring pool design combines functionality, beauty, and durability that remains appealing for decades. Cla...

item.title: Fire at Glasgow vape shop spreads to historic building, causing partial collapse
item.description: A fire broke out at a vape shop on Union Street next to Glasgow Central station on Sunday at around 15:45. Eyewitness Lamin Kongira, who was passing by, attempted to tackle the blaze with a fire extin...

item.title: European Natural Gas Prices Climb Sharply Amid Market Tensions

item.title: Implications of Aboriginal Title Rulings on Private Land Ownership in Canada
item.description: Recent legal developments in Canada, including the Cowichan court ruling and the Musqueam agreement, have raised questions about the security of private property in areas affected by Aboriginal title....

item.title: Man Hospitalised After Severe Infection Following Suspected False Widow Spider Bite
item.description: A 40-year-old man from Coventry, Chris Keegan, was hospitalised after a suspected bite from a false widow spider led to a severe flesh–eating infection. Initially noticing only a small insect bite on ...

item.title: Parliament session impacted by Iran-Israel conflict and global oil concerns

item.title: Allegations Surface Over Special Promotions Of Wike Allies In Police Force And Their Deployment In Rivers State

item.title: Greens Approve Labor’s Superannuation Tax Measures Ahead of May Budget
item.description: The Greens have signalled their support for the Albanese government’s upcoming May budget, particularly for legislation targeting superannuation balances exceeding $3 million. After months of negotiat...

item.title: Exploring Happiness Beyond Money and Pleasure
item.description: This article explores the concept of happiness and the many ways it is defined and pursued in today's world. The author draws on philosophical and scientific perspectives, including his own research i...

item.title: Pakistan Navy initiates Operation Muhafizul Bahr for securing national shipping amid regional maritime threats
item.description: The Pakistan Navy has officially launched Operation Muhafizul Bahr, as announced by the Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR) on March 9, 2026. This operation aims to tackle multidimensional threats ...
